title: CrystalCore
description: CrystalCore is a dark themed Crystal Pvp texture pack with bright red netherite armor for better visibility and dark purple Totems, Crystals, Obsidian, Ender Pearls and Golden Apples.
body:
**CrystalCore**

Step into the shadows of combat with CrystalCore, a custom texture pack forged for crystal PvP players who demand both clarity and style. With a sleek aesthetic built around deep purples and glowing cyan accents, every element is crafted to sharpen your edge in battle and look good doing it.

• Bright red Netherite armor for high visibility in the heat of PvP

• Clean, minimal visuals designed for maximum focus

• Dark void theme with vibrant highlights

• Perfect for crystal PvP pop off with power and flair
